title: G CLAMP Set Heavy Duty CAST Iron Wood Working Metal Welding C VICE Grip FIX Tool (Full Set All 5 Clamps)
features: G clamps (also known as C clamps) are ideal for holding metal and wood in position, for welding, carpentry and DIY work
Reinforced shoulder frame with corrosion resistant finish; Steel threaded bar with T-bar handle and swivel shoe
Chemically blackened thread prevents weld spatter from sticking; Cast Iron build for strength and durability
You can also buy the full 5pc set (one of each size) or 2pcs of the same size (x2)
description: - G clamps (also known as C clamps) are ideal for holding metal and wood in position, for welding, carpentry and DIY work. - Reinforced shoulder frame with corrosion resistant finish. - Steel threaded bar with T-bar handle and swivel shoe. - Chemically blackened thread prevents weld spatter from sticking. - Cast Iron build for strength and durability. NOTE: The clamp size refers to the maximum distance the jaws will open. - Clamp sizes available: 2inch (throat depth 25mm) 3inch (throat depth 40mm) 4inch (throat depth 50mm) 6inch (throat depth 65mm) 8inch (throat depth 70mm) - You can also buy the full 5pc set (one of each size) or 2pcs of the same size (x2) THIS IS A VARIATION LISTING PLEASE CHOOSE WHAT SIZE YOU REQUIRE FROM THE OPTIONS AT THE TOP OF THE PAGE
